en.extract:
The fulvous-headed brushfinch (Atlapetes fulviceps) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae.
It is found in Bolivia and northwestern Argentina. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forest and heavily degraded former forest.

The '''fulvous-headed brushfinch''' ('''''Atlapetes fulviceps''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Passerellidae]].

It is found in [[Bolivia]] and northwestern [[Argentina]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]] and heavily [[Forest degradation|degraded]] former forest.
